response.overview: Purusha Rathnaya is a 1959 Sri Lankan film directed by A.S. Nagarajan. The film stars Prem Jayanth,  Clarice de Silva,  Millie Kahandawala, Baptist Fernando,  Eddie Yapa,  Pitipana Silva, Piyadasa Wijekoon. Released on 9 May. Swarna Abeynayake became the first woman to produce a Sinhala film. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Purusha Rathnaya
